# Mornings

I have been getting up a little earlier these days. There is no real reason for it. It is just that when the house is still quiet, my mind feels calm and unhurried.

The first thing I do is boil some water and drink a cup of it slowly. While it cools I open the window and let the cold air in. It wakes me up better than coffee does, and it costs nothing.

I am not doing anything special. Even so, a small habit like this makes the whole day start gently, and that is enough for me.
